ksa_text: Design and deliver data and AI training and adoption programs, including needs assessment, curriculum development, training materials creation, delivery execution, effectiveness measurement, and AI adoption strategy integration.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of software design tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Accountability structures are in place so that the appropriate teams and individuals are empowered, responsible, and trained for mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks.

top_anchors.element_label: Accountability structures are in place so that the appropriate teams and individuals are empowered, responsible, and trained for mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks.
Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-004 (OP, Task) maps to Senior Data Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4811 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.481, nist_ai_rmf=0.474, ddat=0.448. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within senior-level analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4811 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-004 (OP, composite 0.4811) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles does not surface this OP-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4811 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for OP domain content at composite 0.4811 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4811, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
